tasks.description: Define and document strengths to retain and weaknesses to address in portfolio construction.

subtasks.description: Summarize the strongest holdings in the portfolio and justification (no tool).
completion_evidence: Identified strongest portfolio holdings (APP, PLTR, SLVR, SGDM, BSX, NRG, AVGO, NVDA, JPM, GREK, NLR, IGSB, VCSH, CMS, WEC, EIS) using risk-adjusted metrics, stress resilience, and diversification. These holdings demonstrate superior Sharpe/alpa, robust up/down macro scenario performance, or act as volatility/drawdown anchors. Rec for retention/overweight.

subtasks.description: Summarize weak/high-risk holdings and document removal/adjustment candidates (no tool).
completion_evidence: Flagged DGNX, IIPR, FR, STAG, TRNO, EQIX, CRDO, MU, FUFU, EXOD, EMQQ, FITB, INTR, NU, NLR for removal/reduction. Criteria: poor/negative Sharpe, high drawdown/volatility, weak stress scenario performance, high cluster correlation (esp. REITs and small banks/semis), and redundancy/inefficient sector exposure. Recommend consolidating sectors/buckets to highest alpha/risk-adjusted return names and seeking diversified, less correlated replacements.

observations:
Tool 'calculate_group_performances' returned: data:
- ann_total_return: 0.019
  ann_volatility: 0.2688
  sub_industry: industrial_reits
- ann_total_return: 0.1415
  ann_volatility: 0.1804
  sub_industry: multi_utilities
- ann_total_return: 5.2736
Tool 'add_task_evidence' returned: True
